tools.description:
Create a new post Creates a new post in the channel and returns the newly created post.
To assign the post to a campaign, use the campaignId parameter in the [create campaign reference](/api/api-campaigns/#tag/campaignsreferences/operation/CreateCampaignReference) endpoint of the Campaigns API.
Tags: Channels Returns: The post has been successfully created. The response contains the newly created post.

contents.description: Contains a set of locale based keys, like "en_US" or "de_DE" with content fields for this language.

content.description: The main content of the news post. Can contain html.

image.description: URL that refers to the image that will be used as primary media of the news post. Will be used notifications and as teaser in the news feed, among other things.

teaser.description: Teaser for this news post, which will be used in notifications and as teaser in the news feed, among other things.

externalID.description: Optional external identifier to easily reference this entity later. Allowed characters for the externalID are a-z (lower case), 0-9, _ and -.

planned.description:
Date of the publication.
Set to `"now"` for immediate publication, a date-time string for scheduled publication,
or `null` to unpublish this news post immediately.
When set to null, there are multiple cases possible together with planned date value:
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Planned(`published(null)`) `planned == previous published time`
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Draft (`planned(null), published(null)`)

notificationChannels.description:
Notification settings of the news post. Only use this property when you want to send out notifications. Available options depend on the default settings of the news channel.
Attention: When updating the news post, it will trigger a re-send of the notifications if you don't remove the property beforehand.

oneOf.description: Immediate publication of the news post
Scheduled publication at the given date. E.g. `"2021-04-19T10:00:00.000Z"`

tools.name: CreateChannelPost

tools.description:
Create page

This endpoint creates a new page within the specified space. You need to provide the content for the page and the `spaceId` in the request body.

Tags: Pages

Returns: __OK__ - The response contains content of the requested page.

adminIds.description: A list of user or group IDs that can manage the page.

contents.description: This contains the locale codes, such as `en_US` or `de_DE` for languages in which the page content is available.

en_US.description: The locale for English as used in the United States.

content.description: The HTML content of the page.

published.description: This parameter specifies whether the page should be published. If set to `true`, the page will be published upon creation. If set to `false`, the page will be saved as a draft.

readerIds.description: A list of user or group IDs that can view the page.

spaceId.description: The Id of the space where the page will be created. If the `spaceId` not is included in the request body, the page is created in the All Employees space by default.

tools.name: CreatePage

tools.description:
Delete page

This endpoint deletes the page based on the `pageId`.

Tags: Pages
tools.name: DeletePage

tools.description:
Delete a news post

Remove a news post from the system by deleting it or moving it to the trash if trash is active on your platform.

Tags: Posts

postID.description: This can be either the ID of the post set by the system or the external ID if supplied on creation of the post.

tools.name: DeletePost

tools.description:
Fetch acknowledgements

Fetch the list of acknowledgements for a news post. The acknowledgements are sorted by the point in time when the user acknowledged the post in descending order.

Tags: Posts

Returns: Returns a list of acknowledgements.

cursor.description: Paging cursor to load the next batch of items.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

postID.description: This can be either the ID of the post set by the system or the external ID if supplied on creation of the post.

tools.name: FetchAcknowledgements

tools.description:
List manageable news channels

Fetch a list of all news channels that are manageable within the current accessor (API-token/user). The result includes news channels that are not published.

Tags: Channels

Returns: Returns all channels that are manageable in the current context.

contentType.description: Optional filter for the given post content types. Defaults to not filtering.

cursor.description: Paging cursor to load the next batch of items.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned. If set to 0 only meta information is returned.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.  Offset for this endpoint is deprecated and will be removed in February 2026.  Use `cursor` instead to page through results.

query.description: A string that can be used for searching the name of a channel.

sort.description: Sort the result in ascending order for channel priority or descending order for the creation, publication or last updated date.

tools.name: GetBranchChannels

tools.description:
Fetch a news channel

Fetch an existing news channel by its ID

Tags: Channels

Returns: Returns the requested channel.
tools.name: GetChannel

tools.description:
List posts of a news channel

Fetch a list of news posts that belong to the news channel.

Tags: Channels

Returns: Returns a list of posts within the channel.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned. If set to 0 only meta information is returned.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.

tools.name: GetChannelPosts

tools.description:
List accessible news channels

Fetch a list of all accessible channels for the current accessor (API-token/user).

Tags: Channels

Returns: Returns all channels that are accessible in the current context.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned. If set to 0 only meta information is returned.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.

query.description: A string that can be used for searching the name of a channel.

tools.name: GetChannels

tools.description:
List posts of a channel for the client view

Fetch a list of news posts for the client view from a single news channel. The client view includes only news posts that are accessible with the current accessor (API-token/user). The posts are ordered by their published date in descending order.

Tags: Posts

Returns: The requested list of news information.

cursor.description: Paging cursor to load the next batch of items.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.

tools.name: GetClientChannelPosts

tools.description:
List channels of a news page for the client view

Fetch a list of channels in which the current accessor (API-token/user) is contributor and therefore allowed to create posts in these channels.

Tags: Channels

Returns: Returns all channels that are accessible in the current context.

cursor.description: Paging cursor to load the next batch of items.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

newsPageID.description: The ID of the news page.

tools.name: GetClientNewsPageChannels

tools.description:
List posts of a news page for the client view

Fetch a list of news posts for the client view from a news channel. The client view includes only news posts that are accessible with the current accessor (API-token/user). A news page can contain multiple news channels. The posts are ordered by publish date.

Tags: Posts

Returns: The requested list of news information.

cursor.description: Paging cursor to load the next batch of items.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

newsPageID.description: The ID of the news page.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.

postType.description: Optional filter for the given post content types. Defaults to not filtering.

tools.name: GetClientNewsPagePosts

tools.description:
Fetch the rights for a news page

Fetch the rights the current accessor has on the news page. This information can be used to determine if the accessor (API-token/user) is allowed to contribute to any news channel assigned to the newspage.

Tags: News Pages

Returns: If the user has contribution rights to this news page the result will contain the "CONTRIBUTE" string.

newsPageID.description: The ID of the news page.

tools.name: GetClientNewsPageRights

tools.description:
Get page

This endpoint returns the content and details of a page based on the `pageId`.

Tags: Pages

Returns: __OK__ - The response contains content of the requested page.
tools.name: GetPage

tools.description:
Get pages

This endpoint returns a list of pages with their content.

Tags: Pages

Returns: __OK__ - The response contains a list of pages.

cursor.description:
The cursor displayed for pagination.
If a value for the parameter `cursor` is present in the response,
a next page is available with the next items listed in it.
To get the next page, the value from the current response should be provided as a `cursor` query parameter
to the current request. If the value in the response is `not present` or `null`, the paginated list ends.

limit.description: The amount of records returned in the list is limited between 1 and 100.

spaceIds.description: The comma-separated list of space identifiers from which you want to retrieve pages.

tools.name: GetPages

tools.description:
Fetch a news post

Fetch an existing news post by its Id.

Tags: Posts

Returns: Returns a single news post.

postID.description: This can be either the ID of the post set by the system or the external ID if supplied on creation of the post.

tools.name: GetPost

tools.description:
List all accessible news posts

Fetch a list of all news posts that are accessible for the current accessor (API-token/user).

Tags: Posts

Returns: Returns a list of posts within the channel.

contentType.description: Optional filter for the given post content types. Defaults to not filtering.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned. If set to 0 only meta information is returned.

manageable.description: Set the access check to restrict the results to either accessible or manageable items.

offset.description: Define an offset to skip this number of items in the response.

query.description: A string that can be used for searching the post content.

sort.description: Sort the result in descending order for the creation, publication or last updated date.

tools.name: GetPosts

tools.description:
Resend notifications

Resend notifications for a news post.

Tags: Posts

Returns: The notification was created successfully.

contents.description: Optional custom notification text for each post localization. If left empty the post content is used.

push.description: Send push notifications for this notification.

recipients.description: Define the target audience for the notification.

postID.description: This can be either the ID of the post set by the system or the external ID if supplied on creation of the post.

tools.name: ResendNotifications

tools.description:
Search news posts Fetch a list of news posts that match the search query in the content, hashtags, image description, teasers, or titles.
This endpoint is in **Beta** and is available for early use and feedback. It may still undergo changes and improvements.
Tags: Posts Returns: Returns a list of posts that match the search parameters.

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned. If set to 0 only meta information is returned.

query.description: A string that can be used for searching the post content.

sort.description: Sort the result in descending order for the creation, publication or last updated date.

tools.name: SearchPosts

tools.description:
Search latest page updates

This endpoint retrieves pages updated or deleted within the last 60 days. 
You can use a cursor value to specify the starting point for fetching updated pages.


Tags: Pages

Returns: __OK__ - The response contains a list of pages that were updated or deleted within the last 60 days.

cursor.description:
The cursor displayed for pagination.
If a value for the parameter `cursor` is present in the response,
a next page is available with the next items listed in it.
To get the next page, the value from the current response should be provided as a `cursor` query parameter
to the current request. If the value in the response is `not present` or `null`, the paginated list ends.

includeDelete.description: The search includes deleted pages within the last 60 days when the parameter is set to `true`.

limit.description: The amount of records returned in the list is limited between 1 and 100.

tools.name: SearchUpdates

tools.description:
Send an email

Endpoint for sending an email

Tags: email

Returns: OK

blockAutoReplies.description: Indicates if the email should block auto replies

fallbackLocale.description: The fallback locale will be used if the user preferred locale is not available in the email content.

recipients.description: The groupIds and UserIds that were selected as recipients at the moment of saving or sending an email.

sendToAllUsers.description: Indicates if the email should be sent to all users in the folder.

unsubscriptionCategoryId.description: The ID of the unsubscription category to be used in the email.

tools.description:
Update Page

This endpoint updates the content and other details of the page based on the `pageId`. You need to provide the updated content in the request body.

Tags: Pages

Returns: __OK__ - The response contains content of the requested page.

adminIds.description: A list of user or group IDs that can manage the page.

contents.description: This contains the locale codes, such as `en_US` or `de_DE` for languages in which the page content is available.

en_US.description: The locale for English as used in the United States.

content.description: The HTML content of the page.

published.description: This parameter specifies whether the page should be published. If set to `true`, the page will be published upon creation. If set to `false`, the page will be saved as a draft.

readerIds.description: A list of user or group IDs that can view the page.

spaceId.description: The Id of the space where the page will be created. If the `spaceId` not is included in the request body, the page is created in the All Employees space by default.

tools.name: UpdatePage

tools.description:
Update a news post Updates an existing news post with the data provided in the request and returns the updated object as a response.
To assign the post to a campaign, use the campaignId parameter in the [create campaign reference](/api/api-campaigns/#tag/campaignsreferences/operation/CreateCampaignReference) endpoint of the Campaigns API.
Tags: Posts Returns: The post has been successfully updated. Returns the recently updated post.

contents.description: Contains a set of locale based keys, like "en_US" or "de_DE" with content fields for this language.

content.description: The main content of the news post. Can contain html.

image.description: URL that refers to the image that will be used as primary media of the news post. Will be used notifications and as teaser in the news feed, among other things.

teaser.description: Teaser for this news post, which will be used in notifications and as teaser in the news feed, among other things.

externalID.description: Optional external identifier to easily reference this entity later. Allowed characters for the externalID are a-z (lower case), 0-9, _ and -.

planned.description:
Date of the publication.
Set to `"now"` for immediate publication, a date-time string for scheduled publication,
or `null` to unpublish this news post immediately.
When set to null, there are multiple cases possible together with planned date value:
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Planned(`published(null)`) `planned == previous published time`
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Draft (`planned(null), published(null)`)

id.description: The identifier for this news post which was assigned at creation.

published.description:
Date of the publication.
Set to `"now"` for immediate publication, a date-time string (e.g. `"2021-04-19T10:00:00.000Z"`) for scheduled publication,
or `null` to unpublish this news post immediately.
When set to null, there are multiple cases possible together with planned date value:
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Planned(`published(null)`) `planned == previous published time`
- Scheduled/Published (`planned == published or null, published == <time>`) -> Draft (`planned(null), published(null)`)

postID.description: This can be either the ID of the post set by the system or the external ID if supplied on creation of the post.

tools.name: UpdatePost

Generate an email with AI based on the user's input.

- application/vnd.staffbase.emails.completions.v2+json: v2 implementation (experimental)

maxToolRounds.description: Maximum number of tool calling rounds (v1 only). For testing only, will be removed later.

model.description:
Override the default model. Allowed values: gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4o, gpt-5-nano, gpt-5-mini.
For testing only, will be removed later.

prompt.description: The prompt or context for generating the email.

systemPrompt1.description:
Optional override for the Phase 1 (style extraction) system prompt.
For testing only, will be removed later.

systemPrompt2.description:
Optional override for the Phase 2 (content planning) system prompt.
For testing only, will be removed later.

systemPrompt3.description:
Optional override for the Phase 3 (content creation) system prompt.
For testing only, will be removed later.

templateId.description: template id to be used for content.

tools.description:
Get an email's alignment survey contents

Determines the best fitting alignment survey content for all
email content languages currently existing for this email.
This involves checking for the email content language, the email's fallback
language, the branch's default language, eventually falling back to the
first (i.e. based on alphabetic order of language keys) available translation of the survey.


Tags: email

Returns: OK
tools.name: getAlignmentSurveyContents

query.description: The search criteria for the templates

sortBy.description: The sorting criteria for the templates

tools.name: getTemplates

tools.description:
Get the web version of the email.

Fetches this email's content and retrieves a web version of it
from content-converter.


Tags: email, web

Returns: The Web Version HTML markup of the email.
tools.name: getWebVersion

tools.description:
Get the available languages for the web version of the email.

Fetches this email's content languages and returns them as language tags.


Tags: email, web

Returns: This email's content languages as language tags.
tools.name: getWebVersionLanguages

blockAutoReplies.description: Indicates if the email should block auto replies

fallbackLocale.description: The fallback locale will be used if the user preferred locale is not available in the email content.

unsubscriptionCategoryId.description: The ID of the unsubscription category to be used in the email.

recipients.description: The groupIds and UserIds that were selected as recipients at the moment of saving or sending an email.

sendToAllUsers.description: Indicates if the email should be sent to all users in the folder.

ianaTimezone.description: IANA timezone, does not affect scheduledFor

scheduledFor.description: The date and time at which the email is scheduled to be sent. This timestamp is stored in ISO8601 format.

tools.description:
Get the preview HTML of the email.

Fetches this email's content and retrieves the preview HTML markup
from content-converter. In addition dynamic blocks contained in the email
can be shown or hidden by specifying query parameters.


Tags: email

Returns: The preview HTML markup of the email.

tools.description:
Get the list of reporters of a user

Tags: /profiles/org-chart

Returns: __OK__ - Returns the list of users with the profile field value.

cursor.description: Possible cursor to get the next or previous data

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

userId.description: The ID can be based on either the UserID automatically generated by the Staffbase platform or the externalID, if it is added for the user.

tools.name: reporters-org-chart

tools.description:
Search for users by profile field

Tags: /profiles/search

Returns: Returns the list of users with the profile field value.

cursor.description: The cursor to the next page

fields.description: The profile fields to search for

limit.description: The maximum number of profiles to return

query.description: The search query parameter to filter profiles by name or other attributes.

sort.description: The field and direction by which the profiles should be sorted.

status.description: The status of the users to filter by

Search for media items

Searches media entities based on a query string with pagination
support.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return (default 100)

sort.description: The field and direction by which to sort results.

tools.description:
Search for profiles given a query

Searches for user profiles based on the provided query parameters.

Tags: /profiles/search

Returns: A list of profiles matching the search criteria.

cursor.description: Possible cursor to get the next or previous data

limit.description: The amount of items that should be returned.

query.description: The search query parameter to filter profiles by name or other attributes.

sort.description: The field and direction by which the profiles should be sorted.

tools.name: searchProfiles

This endpoint lists space audiences also known as space groups for the given spaceId.

Returns: Success

cursor.description: A pagination cursor to retrieve the next or previous set of results.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

query.description: A search query to filter the result set.

tools.name: searchSpaceAudiences

tools.description:
Send a test email to recipients

This endpoint will send the email to a set of test recipients defined within the request.

Tags: email

Returns: Test-email was accepted

blockSettings.description: Settings for viewing the email in full or as specific groups or users. Exactly one of viewAs or viewAll must be set .

oneOf.description: Settings for viewing the email as specific groups or users. At least one of groupIds or userIds along with type must be provided.

recipients.description: The groupIds and UserIds that were selected as recipients at the moment of saving or sending an email.

tools.name: sendTestEmail

tools.description:
Send a test email from template

This endpoint will send the email to a set of test recipients defined within the request.

Tags: template

Returns: Test-email was accepted

blockSettings.description: Settings for viewing the email in full or as specific groups or users. Exactly one of viewAs or viewAll must be set .

oneOf.description: Settings for viewing the email as specific groups or users. At least one of groupIds or userIds along with type must be provided.

recipients.description: The groupIds and UserIds that were selected as recipients at the moment of saving or sending an email.

tools.name: sendTestEmailFromTemplate

body.description: Data structure with all available fields for a profile field update.

localization.description: Contains a set of locale based keys, like "en_US" or "de_DE" with localized fields for this language.

body.title: ProfileFieldUpdatePayload

slug.description: It is the slug generated by the Staffbase platform.

tools.name: update

tools.description:
Updates a folder using the installations API, considering the specific
permissions for different roles in the email domain


Tags: folder

Returns: Folder was updated

description.description: Optional. If provided, must not be blank (after trimming).

enableUnsubscriptionCategories.description: Indicates whether unsubscription categories are enabled in the folder.

galleryIds.description: List of gallery IDs assigned to the folder. If provided, the templates from the specified galleries can be used in a folder for draft creation. If empty array is passed, gallery assignments are removed, and template usage is not allowed in the folder.

useAllAvailableGalleries.description: Indicates whether a folder can use templates from all galleries available in the folder's space including the ones available across all spaces.

tools.name: updateFolder

templateAdminIds.description: List of template admin user IDs and user group IDs
